textByHash.85f5d9993cdb17cccff3afe2c5168b0376d38006: I'd be very careful going down there friend.
textByHash.62122738e9107b1799b9deb3e571e457601e8c66: Salarin the twisted. One of Kandarin's most dangerous chaos druids. I tried to take him on, then suddenly felt immensely weak.
textByHash.151868c4f67acd7fdd634b932bf0e984a7c75a7b: I hear he's susceptible to attacks from the mind. However I have no idea what that means, so it's not much help to me.
textByHash.82af90a6887a536abe487ebbbb97d0897e8a3c16: You might find you are not so strong shortly...
